summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a fiery August 15 1971 show, highlighted by a smoking Truckin → Other One sequence and glowing Pigpen and Phil moments.
review: The performance is praised as an engaging fire‑brand set with standout stretches like Truckin→Drums→The Other One, Wharf Rat and Turn On Your Lovelight, plus bright contributions from Jerry, Phil and the late Ron "Pigpen" McKernan. The soundboard recording sounds good overall – crisp enough to be called “classic 1971” despite a few anomalies that listeners can smooth with EQ.

ai_rating.rationale: All four detailed reviews rate the show 5 stars and highlight strong musical moments and a generally good soundboard recording; weighted average of show (≈4.5) and recording (≈4.3) yields ~4.4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and crisp classic 1971 sound; a few anomalies/flubs noted, but listeners report it sounds great and recommend EQ adjustments.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong flow with a classic mid‑set sequence Truckin → Drums → The Other One and solid second‑set material, delivering an engaging firebrand performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his Les Paul tone and overall guitar work (“Scurvy Les Paul Jerry”).
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted as shining on this night.
